title: Monday Sales CRM - after removing the quick item view - the new full item view needs a 'back' button
excerpt:

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently a new feature / change was issued in Monday Sales CRM:

Whenever we click on a connected item in a connected boards column - instead of opening the item preview, like it would do previously, it now open directly the entire item page.

This is not necessarily bad - however one important feature that would be really helpful here would be to have a “back” button.

Scenario:
I am currently viewing a Deal item and see a connected company item.

When I click the connected company item, it now open the full item view with all the widgets loaded. However, now I do not have a way to get back from the connected company item to the Deal item.

I would have to navigate all the way “out” of the Board.
